title: Create: Droid Netherrack
description: Renewable source of Netherrack with Create Mod!
body:
Introducing Create: Droid Netherrack

This is a Minecraft mod addon for the Create Mod. This mod allows you to have a renewable source of netherrack, using create mod components. This means you can now fully automate the creation of blaze cake, as well as other recipes involving cinder flour.

This mod creates 2 types of recipe for the creation of Netherrack. You can view them using JEI. Screenshots of recipes can be seen in the gallery.

The Create mod is required when playing is mod.

Mod Showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KbANNHuOR44" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
.

If you have any problems or found bugs in the mod, report it in GitHub (Under "external resource").

Want renewable Diamonds with create? [https://modrinth.com/mod/droids-create-diamond-recipe](https://modrinth.com/mod/droids-create-diamond-recipe)

Want to download from Curseforge? [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-droid-netherrack](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-droid-netherrack)
